zh.lifeSummary: Janet Neilson於1471年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾萊斯馬哈格福。她於1489年與Charles Stedman在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在英國蘇格蘭費伏享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Neilson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Nielson   1, or an Anglicized form of   McNeil  .
Americanized form of Swedish   Nilsson   or Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Nielsen   (compare   Neilsen  ) or   Nilsen  . Compare also   Nelson   and   Nielson  .

variants.name: Nielson
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): patronymic from the personal name   Neil  , meaning ‘son of Neil’, or an Anglicized form of   McNeill  .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, or North German   Nielsen   and, in some cases, of Swedish   Nilsson  .

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Janet Neilson was born in 1471, in Lesmahagow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. She married Charles Stedman in 1489, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1510, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Neilson(은)는 1471년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 레스마하고에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1489년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에서 Charles Stedman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Janet Neilson родилась в 1471 г. в местности лесмахагоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles Stedman в 1489 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.
